basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Nurse, Project Technical Support/ Officer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Project Nurse III / Project Technical Support / Officer III
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Project Nurse III / Project Technical Support / Officer III Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website https://jipmer.edu.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the JIPMER Project Nurse III / Project Technical Support / Officer III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Nursing or Engineering/IT/CS/EC Graduation with experience or Master's in Engineering/IT/CS/EC with experience
qualification.details: Project Nurse III: B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized university. Project Technical Support / Officer III: Four years Graduation degree in Engineering/IT/CS/EC plus three years' Experience or master's degree in engineering/IT/CS/EC + one year of experience.

salary_details.details: Project Nurse III: Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA Per Month Project Technical Support / Officer III: Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.jawaharlal_institute_of_postgraduate_med: Project Nurse III / Project Technical Support / Officer III
B.Sc. Nursing or Engineering/IT/CS/EC Graduation with experience or Master's in Engineering/IT/CS/EC with experience

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JIPMER Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Nurse III: B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized university. Project Technical Support / Officer III: Four years Graduation degree in Engineering/IT/CS/EC plus three years' Experience or master's degree in engineering/IT/CS/EC + one year of experience.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Project Nurse III: Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA Per Month Project Technical Support / Officer III: Rs. 28,000 + 20% HRA Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Recruitment 2026 is 18th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Project Nurse III and Project Technical Support / Officer III.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Nurse III?
faq.answer: For the Project Nurse III position, candidates must possess a B.Sc. Nursing degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 28,000 per month, plus 20% HRA.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to the designated address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the selection criteria for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: These positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JIPMER located?
faq.answer: JIPMER is located in Puducherry, with the pincode 605006.
